name: Shepherd's Pie #5
recipeIngredient: 1 package (10-oz) frozen peas or 1 lb peas shelled
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in salted water to cover. Drain, cool and peel.
2. Mash the potatoes with butter, milk, and season to taste with salt and pepper. Set aside.
3. Sauté beef until browned, stirring to keep meat crumbly. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
4. Add tomatoes, mushrooms, parsley, tomato paste, Worcestershire sauce, and gravy. Stir to mix.
5. Add peas and cook about 5 minutes.
6. Turn the mixture into a casserole dish.
7. Spread potatoes evenly over the meat.
8. Bake at 400 degrees for 40 minutes until the top is crispy brown.
